title: Tyrannos MC Expansion
description:
Something I made for me and my friends to have fun.
Made to be fun, and to frustrate my friends a little.
body:
Something for me and my friends, was making a long description, but it got deleted so you get the short version.




**For Starters I don't own any of the mods here and they belong to their respective authers/owners.
If you want to know what mods are in the modpack, check the relations to it.
**


This Modpack has:
- More Biomes? Yes
  
- More Weapons? Yes
  
- Dragons? Yes
  
- A lot more mobs, both peaceful and hostile? Yes
  
- Better Farming? Yes
  
- Better Exploration? Yes
  
- More stuff to build with? Yes
  
- A changing world? Yes
  
- More Difficult? Yes
  
- More ways to travel vast distances? Yes
  
- Better Movement? Yes
  
- Ease of life mods? Yes
  
- No Elytra? LOL Yes
  
- More Bosses? Yes
  
- Better End (Not the mod)? Yes
  
- Better Nether (Not the mod)? Yes
  
- Better Combat? Yes




**Mods I got from curseforge and the links to their respective pages:

Lucky's Spelunker's Charm II - www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/spelunkers-charm-ii

Mowzie's Mobs - www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mowzies-mobs

Dungeon Crawl - www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dungeon-crawl **
